title: Scalar Lax-Friedrichs update preserves constant states

source.notes: Consistency seed for the scalar Lax-Friedrichs update: equal left and right states are preserved.

informal.statement: For any real cfl and constant value u, the scalar Lax-Friedrichs update with uLeft = uRight = u returns u.
assumptions: cfl and u are real numbers
the left and right neighboring values are equal
informal.expected_conclusion: The scalar Lax-Friedrichs update preserves constant states.

declarations.name: laxFriedrichsStep
declarations.statement: def laxFriedrichsStep (cfl uLeft uRight : ℝ) : ℝ := laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * uLeft + laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * uRight

declarations.name: laxFriedrichsStep_const
declarations.statement: theorem laxFriedrichsStep_const (cfl u : ℝ) : laxFriedrichsStep cfl u u = u

tasks.input: Translate the constant-state preservation statement for the scalar Lax-Friedrichs update into Lean 4.
tasks.target: theorem laxFriedrichsStep_const (cfl u : ℝ) : laxFriedrichsStep cfl u u = u

tasks.input: Given the weight and step definitions, complete the Lean 4 proof.
tasks.target: A proof using unfold and ring.
